headline: Honeywell International : Liquefaction Technology and Equipment to Drive Additional Production at Rio Grande LNG Project
summary: CHARLOTTE, N.C., April 13, 2026 -- Honeywell today announced that its industry-leading liquefaction process technology and equipment will be used in NextDecade's Rio Grande LNG Train 4 and Train 5...
